comp.open_world_online_desc: Online servers supporting real-time open world sync
comp.day_night_cycle_desc: Real day/night cycle with NPC schedule changes
comp.procedural_dungeon_desc: Different map layout each time you enter
comp.branching_dialog_desc: Multi-branch dialog where choices affect story
comp.base_building_desc: Freely build and upgrade your base
crisis.server_meltdown_desc: Long-accumulated bugs caused the server to overheat! The entire system may crash if not handled.
crisis.server_meltdown_opt_a_result: New server deployed, stability restored, bugs reduced significantly.
crisis.server_meltdown_opt_b_result: Fixed overnight. Bugs slightly reduced but dev progress slowed.
crisis.server_meltdown_opt_c_result: Patch fix, bugs keep accumulating, trust drops.
crisis.talent_war_desc: Competitors are poaching your key employees with high salary offers!
crisis.talent_war_opt_a_result: Employees stay, loyalty and trust improve.
crisis.talent_war_opt_b_result: Some stay, morale drops, dev efficiency falls.
crisis.talent_war_opt_c_result: Key staff stay, others resent. Code quality affected.
crisis.scope_creep_desc: The team keeps coming up with 'just one more feature' ideas. Add them and risk delay, or cut them and lose potential.
crisis.scope_creep_opt_a_result: Gameplay score jumps! But project is heavily delayed and bugs increase.
crisis.scope_creep_opt_b_result: Project on time, but missed some great opportunities.
crisis.scope_creep_opt_c_result: Progress back on track but code quality suffers, tech debt increases.
crisis.publisher_crunch_desc: The publisher demands an earlier release! 'Miss this window and you lose your slot.'
crisis.publisher_crunch_opt_a_result: Project ships on time. Employee satisfaction drops, bugs skyrocket, trust damaged.
crisis.publisher_crunch_opt_b_result: Three more months. Tech debt reduced, publisher trust improved.
crisis.publisher_crunch_opt_c_result: Shipped, but story content was cut, score suffers.
crisis.lead_departure_desc: Your lead developer/artist just resigned! This is your most experienced team member.
crisis.lead_departure_opt_a_result: Lead stays. Team sees the company values talent. Trust increases.
crisis.lead_departure_opt_b_result: Lead leaves. Dev progress severely impacted, quality drops.
crisis.lead_departure_opt_c_result: New lead struggles. Bugs increase, stability declines.
crisis.review_bomb_desc: Your game is getting review bombed due to excessive bugs! Score is tanking.
crisis.review_bomb_opt_a_result: Nightly patch deployed. Bugs reduced dramatically, trust recovers.
crisis.review_bomb_opt_b_result: Stability improved but players aren't buying it. Sales decline.
crisis.review_bomb_opt_c_result: Bugs partially fixed but progress slows and sales suffer.
crisis.engine_debt_desc: Years of quick fixes have finally caught up. Compile times doubled, crash rate spiking.
crisis.engine_debt_opt_a_result: Expensive but effective. Tech debt slashed, stability improved.
crisis.engine_debt_opt_b_result: Dev progress slowed, bugs slightly increased. But it holds.
crisis.engine_debt_opt_c_result: Progress preserved but tech debt and bugs keep piling up.
crisis.community_desc: Negative sentiment is spreading in the player community: 'Is this studio going under?'
crisis.community_opt_a_result: Sincerity wins the community back. Bugs fixed, trust recovers.
crisis.community_opt_b_result: Sentiment worsens. Sales and trust decline.
crisis.community_opt_c_result: Some bugs fixed but nobody noticed. Progress slowed.
